title: calochortus weedii var. peninsularis
intro: Calochortus weedii var. peninsularis, also known as the San Diego mariposa lily, is a rare, bulbous perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Calochortus weedii var. peninsularis include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against infection. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by drying the bulbs and roots, and then infusing them in hot water to create a medicinal tea, or by using a tincture made from the plant's extracts.
